purpose: First Seongsu place-candidate batch for A Drop of Seoul. These are internal research candidates, not public recommendations.
methodology: Start from the safe source archive when available.
Attach local and global validation links for each candidate.
Keep candidates unpublished until official pages, map listings, hours, and traveler friction are manually reviewed.

candidates.editorialAngle: A strong anchor for a Seongsu beauty route: brand-world discovery, testing, and Korean beauty retail as an experience rather than a shelf.
candidates.notes: High-priority verification target. Confirm current official page, hours, reservation or entry rules, and whether foreign visitors can use services smoothly.

evidence.observedValue: Archive contains Amore Seongsu as a Seongsu store candidate.
Use for current Korean-language verification before publishing.
Use for English-language traveler visibility and source discovery.
Public Instagram profile responded successfully during review on 2026-07-13.

candidates.nameEn: Olive Young Seoul Forest Station Branch
candidates.editorialAngle: A practical stop for readers who want current K-beauty products near Seoul Forest without making Myeongdong the default.
candidates.notes: Useful as a route-support listing, not necessarily a standalone editorial feature. Confirm branch name, hours, tax-free support, and crowd patterns.
